title: malaxis anceps
intro: Malaxis anceps, also known as the divided-spurred orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis anceps include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
